calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And Orders: 1) Compelling Trustee To Account And Provide Records; 2)For Su
Off Calendar Jan-29-2021 Text Ruling

Petition For Instructions Regarding Defense Of Trust And Trustee At Expense Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-27-2021 Text Ruling

Petition For Instructions And Orders: 1) Compelling Trustee To Account And Provide Records; 2)For Suspension And Removal Of Trustee; 3) For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jan-25-2021 Continued To Apr-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Konstantine Demiris appeared by zoom for James Soto Godoshian (Petitioner/Beneficiary/Respondent).
Trang La appeared by zoom for Linda Lester (Trustee).
Sumble Manzoor appeared by zoom for Armenian General Benevolent Union (Beneficiary).

The Court asked if anyone has filed an ex parte petition to consolidate the cases. Mr. Demiris stated that he prepared a stipulation and order, that it has been circulated to Counsel, that he received some inquiries, that he will be making some changes and that he will be filing it. Mr. Demiris also stated that the Trustee filed a petition for order to amend and restate trust, that discovery is on hold right now, and that they have discussed mediation, but he is not quite sure what the position of the Trustee is. Ms. La stated that she proposed mediation and that she is still willing, ready and able to attend mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 12, 2021. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 19, 2021. The Petition for Instructions and Orders, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on April 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties are to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the mediation order. The Court will consolidate the cases on its own motion. The parties agree that the hearing dates of February 1. 2021 and February 2, 2021 are also continued to April 28, 2021.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
